title: Add 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house with characters and 2030 costume character announcements

requirements.summary: Add 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house to the Haunted Houses section with tagline
acceptanceCriteria: Haunted house appears in the Haunted Houses section alongside existing houses
Tagline 'never talk back we just want to rip ur head off' is displayed
House is accessible via detail page navigation

file_operations.description: Add 'Toys Come to Play' card to the haunted houses grid with generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/house-toys-come-to-play.dim_1400x900.jpg, tagline 'never talk back we just want to rip ur head off', description from hauntedHouses.ts, and navigation button to detail page

Create detail page for 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house displaying hero image frontend/public/assets/generated/toys-come-to-play-exterior.dim_1200x600.png, house name, tagline 'never talk back we just want to rip ur head off', full description including 22 different scenes, characters Blippy and Jiffy with scene description 'out of breath and almost head', extreme horror warning alert, and button to view guest rules
Add route for /toys-come-to-play that renders ToysComeToPlayPage component in the hash-based router configuration

Verify 'Toys Come to Play' entry exists with name, tagline 'never talk back we just want to rip ur head off', description mentioning 22 different scenes, characters Blippy and Jiffy, and scene description 'out of breath and almost head'
Add guest rules entry for 'Toys Come to Play' with safety guidelines, behavior rules, and health warnings appropriate for a toy-themed horror attraction

Verify 'Toys Come to Play' sneak peek card exists in the preview grid with image frontend/public/assets/generated/house-toys-come-to-play.dim_1400x900.jpg, tagline, and navigation button to ToysComeToPlaySneakPeekPage

requirements.summary: Add characters Blippy and Jiffy to 'Toys Come to Play' with scene descriptions integrated into 22 scenes system
acceptanceCriteria: Blippy and Jiffy characters are mentioned in the haunted house description
Scene description 'out of breath and almost head' is incorporated into the scenes
Information about 22 different scenes is displayed in the haunted house detail page

file_operations.description: Add dedicated character showcase section featuring Blippy with image frontend/public/assets/generated/blippy-scene.dim_800x600.png and Jiffy with image frontend/public/assets/generated/jiffy-scene.dim_800x600.png in a two-column grid layout, include scene description 'out of breath and almost head' integrated with the 22 different scenes information display

Update 'Toys Come to Play' entry to prominently feature characters Blippy and Jiffy in the description, incorporate scene description 'out of breath and almost head', and explicitly mention the 22 different scenes as a key attraction feature

requirements.summary: Add 2030 investment announcement featuring new costume characters and princesses
acceptanceCriteria: 2030 investment announcement is visible on the site
All four new costume characters are listed: Lola the Rabbit, Asher the Rabbit, Max, and DD
Princesses section is included in the announcement
Content clearly indicates this is for 2030

file_operations.description: Create announcement section for 2030 investment featuring banner text 'In 2030 we are getting our biggest investment for the kids', character showcase grid displaying Lola the Rabbit and Asher the Rabbit (her boyfriend) with image frontend/public/assets/generated/lola-asher-rabbits.dim_1000x600.png, Max with image frontend/public/assets/generated/max-character.dim_600x800.png, DD with image frontend/public/assets/generated/dd-character.dim_600x800.png, and mention of all new princesses
Add CostumeCharacters2030Section component to the home page rendering sequence after AuditionsSection and before UpcomingEventsSection

requirements.summary: Add audition information for 2030 costume characters emphasizing vocal skills
acceptanceCriteria: Audition section mentions vocal requirements for costume character roles
Clarification that 'some sing some don't' is included
Information is associated with the 2030 characters announcement

file_operations.description: Add audition call-to-action subsection within the 2030 announcement featuring vocal skills emphasis with text 'if u want to audition just be vocal and some sing some don't', include button linking to costume character audition form or auditions page
Update costume character audition card to include 2030 investment context, vocal skills requirement with note 'some sing some don't', and mention the new characters (Lola, Asher, Max, DD, princesses)

Create dialog form component for costume character audition submissions with fields for name, age, email, phone, vocal range/skills, musical skills, character preferences (referencing 2030 characters), performance preferences, physical limitations, schedule conflicts, experience, and Internet Identity authentication requirement, submitting via actor.submitCostumeCharacterAudition

Add mutation hook useCostumeCharacterAuditionSubmission that maps UI form data to backend CostumeCharacterAuditionForm structure and calls actor.submitCostumeCharacterAudition, handling success/error states with toast notifications
